product_name: Hoffman "Easy Vision" Table Television — Early 1950s (Amber Screen, As-Is)
attributes: Hoffman Radio Corp. (Los Angeles) • Early-1950s table/portable TV • Amber-tinted "Easy Vision" safety glass over rounded CRT • Wood cabinet (repainted) • 4 original knobs incl. lighted tuning dial • On period folding metal stand • UNTESTED / sold as-is
condition: Vintage — untested, as-is (cosmetic restoration / decor project)
condition_notes: Early-1950s Hoffman table television (Hoffman Radio Corp., Los Angeles), with the brand's signature amber "Easy Vision" tinted safety glass over a rounded-rectangular CRT. Raised script 'Hoffman' badge on the woven grille cloth is intact and clear. All four front controls present — three maroon knobs plus a lighted/numbered tuning dial — on a brass control plate. The wood cabinet has been REPAINTED at some point: cream/off-white top, mint-green case sides; original wood-tone front fascia remains. Honest age wear throughout — paint chips and scuffs to the case, surface grime, light tarnish on the bezel, a small old sticker residue on top. Sits on a period folding tubular-metal stand (likely a later pairing, not confirmed original to the set). NO model or chassis number was legible in the available photos — model TBD; the back/chassis was not photographed clearly. UNTESTED: not powered up, function unknown — sold strictly AS-IS for display, decor, or a restoration project. Vintage tube electronics should be inspected/re-capped by a qualified tech before any attempt to power on.

square.note: Listed 2026-06-20. Local pickup preferred (oversize fragile CRT). UNTESTED/as-is.

shipping.method: UPS Ground / freight-style boxing — fragile + heavy CRT
shipping.notes: FRAGILE vintage CRT television — heavy (est. ~25-30 lb without stand). Double-box with rigid foam around the picture tube/bezel; the glass CRT face is the main breakage risk. Estimated dims ~24x20x20 in put the longest side at/over the 24 in oversize threshold — expect an oversize surcharge; local pickup strongly preferred. Stand can ship separately/flat or be offered pickup-only. All weights/dims are estimates pending a scale + tape measure.
